name: nova
description: Config-driven, multi-tier agent system with composable agent primitives

scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core/types build && bun run --cwd packages/core/runtime build && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared build && bun run --cwd packages/core/llm build && bun run --cwd packages/core/context build && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools build && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client build && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator build && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd build
scripts.build:apps: bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/tui build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/launcher build && bun run --cwd packages/apps/metarepo build
scripts.build:plugins: bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory-injector build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/entity-graph build && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory build
scripts.clean: bun run --cwd packages/core/types clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/runtime clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared clean &&bun run --cwd packages/core/llm clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/context clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory-injector clean && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/entity-graph clean && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client clean && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon clean && bun run --cwd packages/apps/tui clean && bun run --cwd packages/apps/launcher clean && bun run --cwd packages/apps/metarepo clean && rm -f packages/core/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/infra/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/plugins/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo packages/apps/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/core/types lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/runtime lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/llm lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/context lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/tools lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/agent lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/orchestrator lint && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/semantic-compiler lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus lint
scripts.review:local: BASE_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD~1) HEAD_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD) bun --env-file=.env scripts/pr-review-ci.ts
scripts.typecheck:split-runtime: bun run --cwd packages/core/types lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/runtime lint && bun run --cwd packages/core/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/comms-bus lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-client lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/graphd lint && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/agent-memory lint && bun run --cwd packages/plugins/memory lint && bun run --cwd packages/infra/harness-daemon lint
scripts.db:setup: bun run db:start && bun run db:migrate
